review_text: I scheduled a picolaser treatment with Dana for some spots on my cheek and wasn’t seeing the results I wanted about a month later. Messaged Dana & she immediately booked me for a follow up appointment. During the appointment she assessed my skin and walked me through her recommendations to achieve better results. Now a few weeks out and the spots on my cheeks have dramatically improved! Thank you, Dana!!

DO NOT GO HERE. Save yourself the heartache. I got a terrible filler job done and they refused to refund me to get it done elsewhere. They took no accountability and they gave no apology. It is strictly about taking your money regardless of what they do to your face.

I’m literally so freaking happy! I had my first session with the Pico laser to remove my micro bladed eyebrows and they are basically gone! After the session with Dana, I looked in the mirror and just wanted to cry. Even with my brows swollen to the high heavens with redness and bleached hairs…I was stunned. I cannot recommend Clarity Skin enough. If you’re thinking about doing this service, just do it! I’ve only had one and I’m completely satisfied already. So thankful for Dana. She is amazing, so sweet and personable. Thank you! I’m so happy! Added a picture, top is no make up, two micro bladed sessions with one touch up each, last session was over 4 years ago. They are pretty faded, gray and saturated. Middle is 3 hours after my session and bottom was my micro bladed brows with make up. I’m so excited for a more natural look! :) thank you Dana and Clarity Skin!

I had such a great experience at Clarity Skin Medical Spa. Jocelyn is fantastic at laser hair removal — she’s thorough, professional, and makes you feel completely comfortable through the whole process. Mitch did my V-Beam treatment and was just as amazing — super knowledgeable and explained everything so well. You can tell they really care about their clients and results. Highly recommend!

I had the best experience with Brooke for my lip filler and flip! From start to finish, the process was smoot and so professional. She took her time to make sure I was completely comfortable and happy with the results, and it really shows - my lips look exactly as I was hoping for. Brooke has such a gentle touch and a great eye for detail. I can’t recommend her enough!

On top of that, the staff at Clarity is so kind and helpful, and the entire office is clean and comfortable to be in.
They are incredible! I got my micro blading laser removed and the pigment is completely gone after just one session. I recommend coming here if you need laser removal!

I have used both Dana and Brooke for different services and they are both extremely professional, keep a very clean and sanitary environment and are experts at their craft! I am so impressed with my outcomes and with their very thoughtful follow ups. Definitely worth the drive from Logan!

This place is so lovely, the atmosphere is inviting and comfortable while being so beautiful and professional at the same time. You definitely are in great hands coming to Clarity Skin I will be a customer for life. Thank you for bringing my vision to life ♥️
Love, love, love clarity! I go here for various things, one of them being for my laser tattoo removal. Highly recommend Mitch & Dana, everyone else is awesome, too!
Great staff and best injectors , love this place

Brooke at Clarity Skin in Draper is amazing! This place is warm and inviting as soon as you walk in. I had such a great experience today — Brooke is professional, knowledgeable, and really listened to what I wanted. I appreciated how she took the time to explain everything about today’s treatment as well as what to expect for my upcoming one.

The environment was so welcoming and relaxing. Even small things stood out — when I asked where the restrooms were, they didn’t just point and give directions. Someone actually walked me there. Most places would’ve said something like, “take a left and then a right at the third brick,” lol. I really appreciated that extra attention to detail. They're filling in a lost art of customer service.

I’m so excited to see how everything turns out for my skin! Can’t wait to return.

I’m currently in the process of laser tattoo removal on my eyebrows. I have been so pleased with Dana and Mitch, and my results. The laser tattoo removal is so much more bearable than the microblading procedure itself. I highly recommend Clarity Skin for anyone wanting their tattooed brows removed!!

I recently had a hydro facial with an exceptional aesthetician named Dana, and it was truly a delightful experience. The soothing ambiance instantly put me at ease, and Dana was attentive and knowledgeable. She tailored the treatment to my skin's needs, executing each step with precision—from the cleansing to the nourishing masks.

Her attention to detail left my skin glowing and revitalized, and she provided helpful recommendations for my skincare routine. I left feeling refreshed and relaxed, and I highly recommend Dana for anyone seeking a thorough and rejuvenating hydro facial experience!

I have also received several  lymph drainage massage with Candice, and they have been a wonderful experience. She is incredibly professional and sweet, making me feel comfortable right from the start. Her gentle touch was truly soothing, and I can already see a difference. The room was clean and had a lovely atmosphere, contributing to a very relaxing experience. I highly recommend Candice.

I can honestly say that any services I have received at Clarity have all been top-notch. Michelle’s injections are always on point, and the front desk staff is both professional and friendly. They truly represent the face of the business; if you don’t connect with the people at the front desk, you’re unlikely to return. I’m impressed with their entire team and highly recommend their services!
Mitch is the best!!

I’ve only had great experiences with Clarity Skin. I’ve even had them fix mistakes from a different provider. Working with them to fix a mistake from another provider really cemented in my trust. I’ve gotten filler and Botox, both of which can have nasty consequences to get wrong, so trust is a big big deal. I’ve seen both Brooke and Michelle and would recommend either to anyone.
I’ll also mention that I care a lot about looking super natural and getting the kind and amount of injectables that absolutely no one would guess I have. If that is also what you’re looking for, I’d definitely recommend Clarity Skin.

Everyone at Clarity Skin is amazing and sweet. Brooke did my lip filler, flip and Botox. She’s so fun and makes the experience so easy. I didn’t experience any pain and only had small bruising and some swelling from the filler. The results are amazing! It’s really been a moment. I would recommend anyone and everyone, even if you just want a consult to see what your options are, to visit Clarity Skin if you’re looking for some pampering. They’re a diamond in the rough. I felt so at home during the entire process and can’t wait to go back 😊

Heidi did all my lymphatic and Wood massage after my surgical procedures. she was so amazing, she took the time to be very gentle but yet very effective. Now now my scars  look amazing. She made them go from great to wow she really knows her stuff. Every time I would leave. I felt so much better. I highly recommend lymphatic massages after any surgical procedure.

Straight up - the front desk staff at Clarity Skin is one of the best I’ve ever dealt with. They are always accommodating - even with last minute cancellations. Unlike most other Utah based skin care institutions that simply do not care about their clients with inflexible cancellation fees, Clarity Skin makes it super simple for working /single parents to indulge in “self care” without the fear of a cancellation fee….Because life happens….Thank you to the beautiful humans at Clarity Skin! 🔥💯🙏

I drive past at least 4 other med spas on my way here, but will always come here because of how friendly they are! Everyone on staff makes you feel so comfortable, they are so informative & do a wonderful job. Mitch & Dana often give samples of products they recommend. Love the injectors as well as the estheticians- I have had several spa procedures done & always leave more educated than the last.

Clarity skin is my “go to” for all my skin care needs. They have helped my skin keep a youthful glow for several years. They are kind, and very gentle. Some of the nicest people you will ever meet. Not only are they nice, but they are extremely knowledgeable and up to date on the best practices and procedures for skin care and anti aging. I highly recommend Clarity!🫶🏻

Heidi is AMAZING! Lymphatic Messages she gave me left me revitalized. I looked forward to seeing her and she helped me tremendously. If you need a lymphatic message I highly HIGHLY recommend her! She knows what she is doing! <3

They would not honor a gift certificate that did not have a written expiration date anywhere on it (despite there being a place for it) after a year. They said their certificates expire a year after being issued but that was never mentioned when it was purchased and they failed to write it on the certificate itself. They should take accountability for their employee not writing an expiration date and honor the certificate as is. Now they just get to keep the money.

Edited: One of their estheticians drove to my house to make this right. She brought me cash back and was super sweet. I hope all companies can recognize when they are in the wrong and do what’s right the first time. Thank you to Dana for making this right after the poor experience before.

They wouldn’t honor a $100 gift certificate that had no expiration date on it. If you want it used by a certain date, and there’s a space to write the expiration date on it, then make that known. If you choose to not write an expiration date on it, then you are saying “it does not expire” and therefore should honor it. Also…very rude customer service! Would not recommend!!!
I've been going to Clarity for over 10 years.  Dana and McKenzie are my favorites for any procedure.  The entire staff (especially Mitch) are so friendly.

I’ve seen several different doctors/nurse injectors over the past couple years, and Clarity Skin takes the cake. One injector in specific, Emily, MUST HAVE SOLD HER SOUL TO THE DEVIL in exchange for the incredible ability she has. The injections she delivers are painless. In fact, I feel NOTHING. I seriously had no idea she had stuck a needle in me and when I asked about it, she said she was already done. I had to look in a mirror and see the injection site for myself to believe it. Perhaps her extensive experience being an OR nurse helped with that, as opposed to selling her soul to the devil.

Nah, it’s gotta be the devil thing.

P.S. the results are amazing. I waited a few months before reviewing just in case there were any surprises.

Edit: I went in again and my face got so messed up. I have TMJ and so Botox was recommended to weaken the masseter. At first, the TMJ pain subsided and I felt a noticeable difference. However, I soon *saw* a noticeable difference as well—and not a good one. The bottom half of my face got so thin and my jawline slackened. Should I have known Botox would have this effect? Yes, probably. However, I never even thought of it and was never told what the implications of receiving such treatment would entail, aesthetically speaking. I was embarrassed to go out into public. Also, I had happened to get a bad filler job around the same time, and for the first time, from them. I requested that filler be placed around and underneath my hollow eyes/dark circles, something I’ve had done many times before with amazing results. However, this time I came out looking like Maleficent and remained that way for months: high, rimmed orbital bones and pointy cheekbones, accompanied by a very slim face ending in a pointy chin.

Because I believe in good communication and in giving others a chance to try again, I went back. I told and showed them what was upsetting me and asked for help. It took several months to start building up my jaw muscles and then about two years to have it restored to normal. There was very little to be done except to wait out the Botox so the muscles could then rebuild themselves. They gave me a few hundred dollars off and generous samples of cosmetic and skin care products. I have waited years to edit this review so I could be further removed from this event and be as objective as possible in my feedback.
Very nice place, warm welcome and very professional

Michelle is very experienced, knowledgeable & takes such precise care with her technique. I fully trust her when it comes to any filler. Clarity skin all around is such an amazing atmosphere, I love it here

I love Clarity Skin. Very Professional. Excellent Customer Services. Environment Friendly.  Very Clean. Affordable.
I do recommend Clarity Skin 100%. Love them!
Really great first experience with Jamie! She answered all my questions and was so friendly. I'll definitely be back!

I love Clarity Skin! I know every time I go here I will leave happy with what I’ve had done. Mackenzie is wonderful and makes me feel so special every time I come to see her and she gives me her honest opinion which I really respect. I had my lips done two weeks ago and they look fantastic, They are plump but still very natural looking.
I've had filler and botox. LOVE Mindy!!!!

I go to Clarity because everyone is nice and professional.I absolutely love Makenzie. She is amazing!!

Yolanda Lear

Not enough words to describe how much I love Clarity! I have been going here for four years for my problematic skin, and Mindy and Mitch are the most wonderful human beings and take such great care of me! Coming here is like hanging out with your oldest and dearest friends. I really cannot recommend this place enough!!
Brooke was amazing!

I am not understanding why they are asking for a tip after injections. I found this to be very unprofessional as it was, I assume, a licensed nurse doing the procedure. It is inappropriate to ask for a tip for this type of service/ about a week after my injection my eye is dropping due to injector error- I am very disappointed with the results I paid a lot of money and was told I will just have to let it wear off- in 3 to 4 months. I am not impressed , I used to get very good results with Emily but she is no longer with Clarity- Michelle needs better training
These guys are awesome.
Always clean and professional.  I adore Mitch! He is great at answering questions and does great chemical peels. Would 10/10 recommend.

I love Clarity Skin! I drive from Wyoming past all of SLC to go to this place. I have had skin cancer surgeries on my face and would consider myself a nontraditional client. I have had botox and fillers to fix my areas of scarring and unevenness. I couldn't be more happy with the results. I don't even request a certain injector anymore because they are all fabulous!!

I don't normally post reviews but I'd be doing Mindy injustice if I didn't go on and brag about her.  She has been getting rid of my "angry face" for a few years now, we talk about doing other things but I've always backed out.  I recently turned 50 and decided to let her do a little cheek lift and contouring and WOW she is literally Van Gogh with a needle.  I had no idea what a difference it would make.  It's so natural looking and I did it with no numbing because she is a genius.  Do yourself a favor, spend a little money on you and go see Mindy at Clarity, I PROMISE YOU, you won't be sorry...she is the real deal!
Mindy did my lip fillers and she did such an excellent job! She is so knowledgeable and is wonderful about explaining in details the steps before , during, and after the fillers. Highly recommend !!
Went in for botox and filler with Brooke O’Brien. She did a amazing job.
I have been going to Clarity Skin for a while now. Very professional, always friendly, very clean, and very organized with the COVID pandemic.  My favorite employees are Mindy and Jocelyn.
I love Mindy! She is down to earth and I would trust her with anything! I recommend clarity skin to everyone. :)
